allow: Bash(node -e "const xlsx = require\('./node_modules/xlsx'\); const wb = xlsx.readFile\('../Support/outil_devaluation_dnssi.xlsx'\); console.log\('Sheets:', wb.SheetNames\); wb.SheetNames.forEach\(name => { const ws = wb.Sheets[name]; const data = xlsx.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws, { header: 1, defval: '' }\); console.log\('\\n=== Sheet:', name, '==='\); data.slice\(0, 10\).forEach\(\(row, i\) => { const cells = row.filter\(c => c !== ''\).join\(' | '\); if \(cells\) console.log\('  row', i, ':', cells.substring\(0, 250\)\); }\); }\);")
